name: Total Card Payments
description_short: Total Card Payments is a credit repair provider based in Dallas, Texas. Rated 3.9/5 with 68 Google reviews, reflecting solid customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Total Card Payments is a credit repair provider serving clients in Dallas, Texas. Carrying a 3.9/5.0 Google rating from 68 reviews, Total Card Payments has an solid reputation among consumers in the Dallas area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Total Card Payments specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Dallas, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Total Card Payments operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Dallas, Texas area who are considering Total Card Payments should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
